title: Project Miner Local PM Intake Detail Workbench Grouping
objective: Reduce day-to-day PM workbench scroll and scan friction by grouping the existing /pm-review/import-intake detail workbench below the helper-panel stack while preserving every existing panel id, aria label, anchor target, route link, quick-jump link, export behavior, status behavior, storage boundary, read seam, and no-authority boundary.
active_role: Technical Repo Authority / PM Product Coordinator / AI Orchestration Usability Implementer
implemented_scope: Add an unframed semantic PM intake detail workbench wrapper below the helper-panel stack.
Group existing detail panels under Review Snapshot Detail, Source and Exception Detail, Approval Prep Detail, Executor Closeout Detail, Field Prep Detail, and Authority Boundary Detail.
Keep existing detail cards, ids, aria labels, anchors, content, storage behavior, exports, route links, quick-jump links, and read seams unchanged.
Add focused smoke coverage proving group headings and expected existing panels inside each detail group.
Update PM lane operating docs, project status, packet, and handoff.
sidecar_result: A read-only sidecar from PM Lane 081 recommended PM Lane 082 as Local PM Intake Detail Workbench Grouping below the helper stack. The recommendation was accepted as a separate browser-local scanability cleanup. A separate read-only sidecar then completed a later-lane scout and recommended PM Lane 083 as a Local PM Intake Authority Wording Smoke Guard. That sidecar made no edits, staged no files, made no commits, and accessed no live Supabase, Render, or Vercel services.
allowed_actions: Modify the local operations-web import-intake page detail-workbench wrapper markup.
Modify focused operations-web smoke tests for the grouped detail-workbench stack.
Update PM lane operating docs, project status, packet, and handoff.
Run focused local validation, commit, push, and restore host parity.
not_allowed: No existing detail panel aria-label change.
No DNS, auth, ingress, or secret change.
validation_steps: rg -n "selected recipient|handoff created|assigned|scheduled|ready for execution|ready for field|field ready|field log of record|hosted parity proven|approval ready|packet admitted|daily report|tracking system|percent complete|released|cleared|approved|accepted|authorized|go/no-go passed|dispatch|dispatched|customer confirmed|JHA complete|LOTO approved|material released|issue created|task created|work order|production-ready" apps/operations-web/app/pm-review/import-intake/page.tsx apps/operations-web/tests/browser-shell.pm-import-intake.smoke.spec.ts
corepack pnpm --dir apps/operations-web exec playwright test tests/browser-shell.pm-import-intake.smoke.spec.ts

corepack pnpm --dir apps/operations-web exec playwright test tests/browser-shell.pm-import-candidate.smoke.spec.ts tests/browser-shell.pm-import-admission-plan.smoke.spec.ts tests/browser-shell.pm-import-approval-readiness.smoke.spec.ts tests/browser-shell.pm-import-intake.smoke.spec.ts
